rationale: The cited 2011 paper develops core WOM driver mechanisms (immediate vs. ongoing WOM; interest, cues, visibility), and the 2019 citing paper explicitly frames its contribution as supplementing prior WOM motivation/dynamics work with new mechanisms (reciprocity, adoption risk, WOM volume/dispersion).
